headline: New Dollar Tree distribution center to support 700 Southwest stores
summary: Dollar Tree’s massive new distribution center in Arizona is ready to go live. The post New Dollar Tree distribution center to support 700 Southwest stores appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Value-Oriented Retailers Turn to Lease Auctions and Sales to Fuel Growth
summary: Healthy, value-oriented retailers are using competitive sales and auctions of leases and fee-owned properties to accelerate their growth, according to New York-based advisory firm A&G Real Estate Partners.

raw.headline: Value-Oriented Retailers Turn to Lease Auctions and Sales to Fuel Growth

headline: Dollar Tree Celebrates Opening of New Distribution Center with Ribbon Cutting
summary: CHESAPEAKE, Va., May 14, 2026--Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) celebrated the opening of its 1-million-square-foot distribution center in Litchfield Park, AZ, with a ribbon-cutting ceremony yesterday.

headline: Dollar Tree is boosting logistics resiliency
summary: A new Arizona distribution center is part of the retailer's strategy to cut transit times, Chief Supply Chain Officer Roxanne Weng said.
